steps.title: Identify the clause structure
steps.content: A subject (“The word 'flummox'”) and introductory adverb (“first”) precede the blank, followed by a prepositional phrase. This is an incomplete independent clause.

steps.title: Select the correct verb form
steps.content: A simple past tense finite verb is required to complete the independent clause. “Appeared” is the simple past tense of appear and functions as the main verb. Choices B, C, and D are non-finite forms (infinitive, present participle, perfect participle) that cannot serve as a main verb. That matches choice A — A is correct.
